parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction

package "<<aggregate>> Product" {
  class Product << (E,#FF7700) >>
  class ShortDescription << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class LongDescription << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class TechnicalDescription << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class Barcode << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class ProductionCode << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class PriceWithoutVAT << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class PriceWithVAT << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class Reference << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class Weight << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class Volume << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class Photo << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class BrandName << (C,#FF7700) >>
}

package "<<aggregate>> Category" {
  class Category << (E,#FF7700) >>
  class AlphanumericCode << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class Description << (C,#FF7700) >>
  class SuperCategory << (C,#FF7700) >>
}

class "Product" as P <<entity>> <<root>> {
  -uniqueInternalCode
}

class "ShortDescription" as SD <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "LongDescription" as LD <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "TechnicalDescription" as TD <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "Barcode" as B <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "ProductionCode" as PC <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "PriceWithoutVAT" as PWoV <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "PriceWithVAT" as PWV <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "Reference" as R <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "Weight" as W <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "Volume" as V <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "Photo" as Ph <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "BrandName" as BN <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>

class "Category" as C <<entity>> <<root>>
class "AlphanumericCode" as AC <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "Description" as D <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>
class "SuperCategory" as SC <<value object>> << (V,#FF7700) >>

P --> "1" SD : characterized by
P --> "1" LD : characterized by
P --> "1" TD : characterized by
P --> "1" B : identified by
P --> "0..1" PC : identified by
P --> "1" PWoV : associated
P --> "1" PWV : associated
P --> "1" R : identified by
P --> "1" W : characterized by
P --> "1" V : characterized by
P --> "1..*" Ph : described
P --> "1" BN : made by
P --> "1" C : organized by

C --> "1" AC : identified by
C --> "1" D : characterized by
C --> "0..1" SC : belongs to

@enduml
```
